Interface ComparableExpression<C extends Comparable<? super C>>

Type Parameters:
C - the type of the expression
All Superinterfaces:
Expression<C>, Selection<C>, TupleElement<C>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BooleanExpression, BooleanPath, CriteriaBuilder.In<T>, NumericExpression<N>, Predicate, TemporalExpression<T>, TextExpression
public interface ComparableExpression<C extends Comparable<? super C>> extends Expression<C>
Type for comparable query expressions.
Since:
4.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Order
    asc()
    Create an ordering by the ascending value of this expression.
    Order
    asc(Nulls nullPrecedence)
    Create an ordering by the ascending value of this expression.
    Predicate
    between(C x, C y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is between the first and second arguments in value.
    Predicate
    between(Expression<? extends C> x, Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is between the first and second arguments in value.
    ComparableExpression<C>
    coalesce(C y)
    Create an expression that returns null if this and the argument evaluate to null, and the value of the first non-null expression otherwise.
    ComparableExpression<C>
    coalesce(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create an expression that returns null if this and the argument evaluate to null, and the value of the first non-null expression otherwise.
    Order
    desc()
    Create an ordering by the descending value of this expression.
    Order
    desc(Nulls nullPrecedence)
    Create an ordering by the descending value of this expression.
    Predicate
    greaterThan(C y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than the first argument.
    Predicate
    greaterThan(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than the first argument.
    Predicate
    greaterThanOrEqualTo(C y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than or equal to the first argument.
    Predicate
    greaterThanOrEqualTo(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than or equal to the first argument.
    Predicate
    lessThan(C y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is less than the first argument.
    Predicate
    lessThan(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is less than the first argument.
    Predicate

    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is less than or equal to the first argument.
    Predicate
    lessThanOrEqualTo(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is less than or equal to the first argument.
    ComparableExpression<C>
    max()
    Create an aggregate expression for finding the greatest of the values (strings, dates, etc).
    ComparableExpression<C>
    min()
    Create an aggregate expression for finding the least of the values (strings, dates, etc).
    ComparableExpression<C>
    nullif(C y)
    Create an expression that tests whether this expression is equal to the argument, returning null if they are and the value of the first expression if they are not.
    ComparableExpression<C>
    nullif(Expression<? extends C> y)
    Create an expression that tests whether this expression is equal to the argument, returning null if they are and the value of the first expression if they are not.

    Methods inherited from interface Expression

    as, cast, count, countDistinct, equalTo, equalTo, in, in, in, in, in, isMember, isNotMember, isNotNull, isNull, notEqualTo, notEqualTo, selectCase

    alias, getCompoundSelectionItems, isCompoundSelection

    Methods inherited from interface TupleElement

    getAlias, getJavaType

  • Method Details

    • greaterThan

      Predicate greaterThan(Expression<? extends C> y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than the first argument.
      Parameters:
      y - expression
      Returns:
      greater-than predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.greaterThan(Expression, Expression)

    • greaterThan

      Predicate greaterThan(C y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than the first argument.
      Parameters:
      y - value
      Returns:
      greater-than predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.greaterThan(Expression, Comparable)

    • greaterThanOrEqualTo

      Predicate greaterThanOrEqualTo(Expression<? extends C> y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than or equal to the first argument.
      Parameters:
      y - expression
      Returns:
      greater-than-or-equal predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.greaterThanOrEqualTo(Expression, Expression)

    • greaterThanOrEqualTo

      Predicate greaterThanOrEqualTo(C y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is greater than or equal to the first argument.
      Parameters:
      y - value
      Returns:
      greater-than-or-equal predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.greaterThanOrEqualTo(Expression, Comparable)

    • lessThan

      Predicate lessThan(Expression<? extends C> y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is less than the first argument.
      Parameters:
      y - expression
      Returns:
      less-than predicate

    • between

      Predicate between(Expression<? extends C> x, Expression<? extends C> y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is between the first and second arguments in value.
      Parameters:
      x - expression
      y - expression
      Returns:
      between predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.between(Expression, Expression, Expression)

    • between

      Predicate between(C x, C y)
      Create a predicate for testing whether this expression is between the first and second arguments in value.
      Parameters:
      x - value
      y - value
      Returns:
      between predicate
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.between(Expression, Comparable, Comparable)

    • max

      ComparableExpression<C> max()
      Create an aggregate expression for finding the greatest of the values (strings, dates, etc).
      Returns:
      greatest expression
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.greatest(Expression)

    • min

      ComparableExpression<C> min()
      Create an aggregate expression for finding the least of the values (strings, dates, etc).
      Returns:
      least expression
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.least(Expression)

    • asc

      Order asc()
      Create an ordering by the ascending value of this expression.
      Returns:
      ascending ordering corresponding to this expression
      Since:
      4.0

    • desc

      Order desc()
      Create an ordering by the descending value of this expression.
      Returns:
      descending ordering corresponding to this expression

    • asc

      Order asc(Nulls nullPrecedence)
      Create an ordering by the ascending value of this expression.
      Parameters:
      nullPrecedence - the precedence of null values
      Returns:
      ascending ordering corresponding to this expression

      Order desc(Nulls nullPrecedence)
      Create an ordering by the descending value of this expression.
